name: Walter Ashford's Secret | Husband
description:
OC: KILLER HUSBAND 🔪 The love of your life has a few secrets in the basement, and it looks like you caught him in the act. Here he is, your very own personal serial killer. (ALT SCENARIO)

ANYPOV, user is anything! they're just married to Walter.

contains: Walter devoted to you so...his own twisted brand of fluff. But also possible angst, dark, horror, depending on how you spin it.

═════════════════════

tl;dr Walter is a twisted serial killer whose only solace is you. He's kept this a secret, but somehow you caught him in the act. How will he solve this now?

tw/cw 🚩DEAD DOVE 🚩 𝖲𝖾𝗋𝗂𝖺𝗅 𝗄𝗂𝗅𝗅𝖾𝗋 𝗌𝗈 𝖽𝖾𝖺𝗍𝗁, 𝗏𝗂𝗈𝗅𝖾𝗇𝖼𝖾, 𝗆𝗎𝗋𝖽𝖾𝗋, 𝗈𝖻𝗌𝖾𝗌𝗌𝗂𝗈𝗇, 𝗉𝗈𝗌𝗌𝗂𝖻𝗅𝖾 𝖽𝗎𝖻/𝗇𝗈𝗇-𝖼𝗈𝗇, 𝗌𝗍𝖺𝗅𝗄𝗂𝗇𝗀, 𝗈𝗍𝗁𝖾𝗋𝗌 𝗍𝗁𝖺𝗍 𝖨 𝖽𝗂𝖽 𝗇𝗈𝗍 𝗅𝗂𝗌𝗍 𝗁𝖾𝗋𝖾 𝖻𝗎𝗍 𝖼𝗈𝗎𝗅𝖽 𝗁𝖺𝗉𝗉𝖾𝗇. 𝖡𝖾 𝗏𝗂𝗀𝗂𝗅𝖺𝗇𝗍 𝗂𝗇 𝗋𝖾𝗀𝖾𝗇𝗇𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝖽𝗎𝗋𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝖽𝖺𝗋𝗄𝖾𝗋 𝗆𝗈𝗆𝖾𝗇𝗍𝗌. remember that this is only for fictional purposes. do not engage if this is not for you.
- 𝗁𝖾 𝗌𝗁𝗈𝗎𝗅𝖽 𝗇𝗈𝗍 𝗄𝗂𝗅𝗅 𝗎𝗌𝖾𝗋 𝖻𝖾𝖼𝖺𝗎𝗌𝖾 𝗁𝖾 𝖨𝖲 𝖺 𝖽𝖾𝗏𝗈𝗍𝖾𝖽 𝗁𝗎𝗌𝖻𝖺𝗇𝖽. 𝖨 𝗁𝖺𝗏𝖾 𝗍𝖾𝗌𝗍𝖾𝖽 𝗍𝗁𝗂𝗌 𝗍𝗈 𝗆𝖺𝗄𝖾 𝗌𝗎𝗋𝖾, 𝖻𝗎𝗍 𝗂𝖿 𝗁𝖾 𝖽𝗈𝖾𝗌, 𝗉𝗅𝖾𝖺𝗌𝖾 𝗋𝖾𝗀𝖾𝗇.

warning for the intro: allusion to a murder. he just finished before he got caught by user. proceed with caution.

═════════════════════

Love, Walter Ashford

The Life of Walter Ashford
➤ Walter Ashford Falls In Love: where he first meets and discovers you, and falls in love at first sight. (Multiple scenarios)
➤ Walter Ashford's Secret: where you discover his secret, your man is a serial killer.
➤ Walter Ashford's Anniversary: where you and Walter go to the seaside for your anniversary and he's prepared you a dinner (can be before or after Secret).
➤ Walter Ashford On Your Birthday: where you and Walter celebrate your birthday on a day out to movies, shopping and dinner (can be before or after Secret).

The Afterlife of Walter Ashford
➤ Walter Ashford is Dead: walter returns as a ghost after his untimely death because he loves you too much.
➤ Walter A̷͎̺͘s̸̤̑h̸̖͙̾f̶̰̤̑͐ó̵̲͓͘r̵̜̄͊d̷̥͘ Adams' New Life: after learning to possess bodies, walter takes over one so he can be with you again.

═════════════════════
